hero.subtitle: AlixcoLuxe
hero.description: A workshop specializing in the creation of personalized art objects, we design unique, refined, and custom-made pieces. Combining elegance and precision, we customize wood, glass, metal, and leather to elevate your corporate gifts and fashion accessories.

trust.delivery_desc: Careful and tracked delivery for all your creations.
trust.quality_desc: Each piece is engraved and designed with utmost precision.
trust.payment_desc: Fully encrypted transactions for your peace of mind.

promo.description: Discover exclusive engraved pieces in a very limited edition. Offer valid while stocks last.

testimonials.subtitle: Testimonials
testimonials.title: Their Alixco Luxe Experience
testimonials.review1_text: The engraving on glass is incredibly fine. An exceptional piece in my living room.
testimonials.review2_text: Perfect corporate gifts. Our partners loved the elegance and quality of customization.
testimonials.review3_text: Masterful work on wood. The details are remarkably precise.

newsletter.title: Join the Private Circle
newsletter.description: Sign up to receive invitations to private sales and preview our new artisanal creations.

footer.brand_desc: The Art of the Unique and the Refinement of Custom-Made. Specialists in art, jewelry, and fashion customization to affirm your unique style.

products.placeholder_desc: This masterpiece embodies the artisanal excellence of Alixco Luxe. Designed with noble materials for a timeless experience and elegance. Every detail has been thought out to sublimate your daily life.

cart.error_msg: An error occurred while validating the order.
cart.empty_desc: Discover our collection to find inspiration.
cart.selection_desc: Check the items before finalizing your order.
cart.redirect_notice: By confirming, you will be redirected to WhatsApp to finalize the purchase with an advisor.
